title: Akashic Goggles
description: The Goggles of Goggles! Inspired by Akashic Tome.
body:
## Adds the Akashic Goggles, letting you wear many different pieces of world-revealing eyewear at once!

##### This mod is inspired by [Akashic Tome](https://modrinth.com/mod/akashic-tome) and [Morph-o-Tool](https://modrinth.com/mod/morph-o-tool). 
**Dependencies: [AutoRegLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoreglib)**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tWDYSYws/images/63b66587289fd6adb7dff2a32ca92c167afe8a1d.png)

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_46h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/akashic-goggles) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/akashic-goggles)

If you're a modpack developer wanting to add Akashic Goggles to a modpack distributed outside of CurseForge or Modrinth, use [File Director](https://modrinth.com/mod/filedirector) to avoid reuploading Akashic Goggles' files.

---

The only item this mod adds is the Akashic Goggles, crafted [as such](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e108ccb0ad7d564c2e8a36961754490bc53683e6.png).

Akashic Goggles are meant to be used in large modpacks where several mods add their own goggles. Instead of cluttering your inventory, or being limited to only wearing one at a time, you can hold them all in one item.

- Akashic Goggles have configurable [Baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles) support.
- Unlike [Akashic Tome](https://modrinth.com/mod/akashic-tome) and [Morph-o-Tool](https://modrinth.com/mod/morph-o-tool), Akashic Goggles do not require swapping and do not change into other items.
- Every stored piece of eyewear in Akashic Goggles is always active.
- All stored items render in the Akashic Goggles item tooltip.
- To insert items into Akashic Goggles, hover the item over the Akashic Goggles in your inventory and right-click. Alternatively, you can use a crafting table to combine Akashic Goggles with the item you want to store. 
- To extract items from Akashic Goggles, right-click them to remove the most recently stored item, or right-click while crouching to remove all stored items.
- Items can be blacklisted from being applicable to Akashic Goggles by using this mod's config.
- Akashic Goggles can be locked by editing its item nbt. Doing this will prevent items from being inserted or extracted. One use-case for this would be to give players a pair of Akashic Goggles with many pieces of world-revealing eyewear inside, but not allow them to be removed.
- This mod adds an `/akashic_goggles` tree command, which contains helpful utilities relating to Akashic Goggles. To see the full list of sub-commands, run `/akashic_goggles help` in-game.

---

Akashic Goggles has built-in support for many mods, but also makes it easy for other mods to add support! This mod also adds configurable [Baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles) support for several modded pieces of eyewear (denoted by an <font color="coral">orange color</font>).

- **Actually Additions**: <font color="coral">*Engineer's Goggles*</font>, and <font color="coral">*Engineer's Infrared Goggles*</font>.
- **BiblioCraft**: <font color="coral">*Reading Glasses*</font>, <font color="coral">*Tinted Glasses*</font>, and <font color="coral">*Monocle*</font>. This mod also stops BiblioCraft from storing its text render data in item nbt, fixing some bugs (like glasses randomly un-equipping themselves).
- **Botania**: *Manaseer Monocle*.
- **Embers Rekindled**: <font color="coral">*Ashen Goggles*</font>.
- **Erebus**: <font color="coral">*Compound Goggles*</font>, and <font color="coral">*Reinforced Compound Goggles*</font>.
- **EvilCraft**: <font color="coral">*Spectral Glasses*</font>.
- **Galacticraft**: <font color="coral">*Sensor Glasses*</font>. This mod also adds two new Sensor Glasses config settings. One that removes the obstructive overlay texture, and another that changes the solid blue textures into tinted ore textures.
- **Nature's Aura**: *Environmental Eye*, and *Environmental Ocular*.
- **OpenBlocks**: <font color="coral">*Amazing Technicolor Glasses*</font>, <font color="coral">*Badass Glasses*</font>, <font color="coral">*Crayon Glasses*</font>, <font color="coral">*Pencil Glasses*</font>, and <font color="coral">*Sonic Glasses*</font>.
- **Railcraft**: <font color="coral">*Trackman's Goggles*</font>.
- **Thaumcraft**: *Goggles of Revealing*.

---

##### Direct contact: [jbred.dev@gmail.com](mailto:jbred.dev@gmail.com)
##### This mod will not be ported
